positive: A mesmerizing celestial creature silhouette of a stylized phoenix mixed with a bioluminescent jellyfish, flowing upwards into a cosmic nebula backdrop. The phoenix elements should feature vibrant, contrasting geometric feather patterns and strong upward curves, suggesting flight and renewal. The jellyfish parts should incorporate delicate, ethereal tentacles trailing downwards and illuminating the space. Use an Art Nouveau/Psychedelic maximalist style with bold, clean linework and high contrast. The primary colors should be deep indigo, electric cyan, magenta, and gold, creating a vaporwave/space-punk aesthetic. The composition must be centrally focused and symmetrical, perfect for an apparel print, ensuring the edges are clean and suitable for printing on fabric. Flat graphic vector style with hyper-detailed glow effects and defined boundaries.
